trending_videos.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizil

trending_videos.title: The Five
trending_videos.description: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

trending_videos.title: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil - Trailer Reaction
trending_videos.description: My reaction to the first teaser for Zach Creagger's Resident Evil. Let's hope it's good!

trending_videos.title: Denver Nuggets at Minnesota Timberwolves
trending_videos.description: Denver plays Minnesota at Target Center for Game 6 of the West first round. Denver won Game 5, while Minnesota leads the series 3-2. Nikola Jokic had 27 points in a triple-double. Jamal Murray's 51-foot buzzer-beater helped Denver snap a skid.

trending_videos.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access Cinematic Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Subnautica 2 is an underwater survival adventure game set on an all-new alien world. It is the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds.

Driven from your home by ongoing conflict, Alterra offers you the chance at a new life. But as the colony ship CICADA shepherds you and your fellow Pioneers to your new home, something goes awry. The ship’s AI insists that your mission should continue. Stranded and faced with near-insurmountable odds, you must do everything in your power to survive. The future of humanity on this world is in your hands.

Subnautica 2 enters Early Access on May 14th, 2026, at 08:00 PDT / 15:00 UTC. 

✨ Wishlist Subnautica 2 Now ✨

Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1962700/Subnautica_2/
Epic: https://store.epicgames.com/p/subnautica-2-d27f94
Xbox: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/games/store/subnautica-2/9PJPCB188SVG

🐟 Join the Community 🐟

Discord: https://discord.gg/subnautica
X: https://twitter.com/Subnautica
TikTok: https://www.tiktok

trending_videos.title: Boston Celtics at Philadelphia 76ers
trending_videos.description: The Celtics play the 76ers at Xfinity Mobile Arena for Game 6 of the Eastern Conference first round. Philadelphia won Game 5, while Boston leads the series 3-2. Joel Embiid dominated the paint and added 33 points to the final score of 113-97.

trending_videos.title: Candlebox - Far Behind | Lyrics
trending_videos.description:
Subscribe And Watch Daily Classic Rock Lyric Videos On Rock Overdrive!
Listen To Rock Playlists: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlFshZyqaBIoItpRklYbnsRFdNcbQEeSP

Candlebox - Far Behind | Lyrics:

Now maybe
I didn't mean to treat you bad
But I did it anyway

And then maybe
Some would say your life was sad
But you lived it anyway

And so maybe
Your friends they stand around they watch you crumble
As you falter to the ground

And then someday
Your friends they stand beside as you were flying
Oh, you were flying, oh, so high

But them someday people look at you
For what they call their own
They watch you suffer
Yeah, they hear you calling home

But then some day we could take our time
To brush the leaves aside
So you can reach us
But you left me far behind

Now maybe
I didn't mean to treat you so bad
But I did it anyway
Now maybe
Some would say you're left with what you had
But you couldn't share the pain
No, no, no

Couldn't share the pain
They watch you suffer

Now maybe
I could
tags: old time rock and roll lyrics

trending_videos.description:
The definitive documentary on beloved comedian Martin Short, using beautiful, intimate, never-before-seen archive.

Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

trending_videos.title: Dallas Stars at Minnesota Wild
trending_videos.description: The Stars take on the Wild for Game 6 of the Western Conference first round at Grand Casino Arena. Minnesota leads the best-of-seven series 3-2. Rookie Jesper Wallstedt made 20 saves. Kirill Kaprizov sealed the win with two minutes left.

dominant_themes.description: The Resident Evil franchise, including a teaser trailer, reaction video, and breakdown, is a dominant theme, indicating high viewer interest and engagement in video game adaptations and related content.
Sports content, particularly NBA and NHL games, maintains a strong presence, suggesting continued viewer interest in live sports events and highlights.

entertainment_prevalence.description: Entertainment content, including trailers and lyrical videos, is prevalent, showcasing a consistent demand for film, television, and music-related media.

diverse_content_creators.description: Top channels producing trending videos vary across different sectors such as entertainment, news, and sports, illustrating a diverse creator ecosystem.

single_video_trend.description: Each top channel has only one video trending, which may suggest that these videos are standalone hits, rather than part of a series or consistent content strategy.

video_game_adaptation_content.opportunity: Given the high interest in Resident Evil content, creators can capitalize on video game adaptation trends by producing related content such as game reviews, thematic analyses, and cross-media comparisons.

sports_highlights_and_analysis.opportunity: With sports videos trending, there is potential for growth in sports content focusing on detailed game analyses, athlete highlights, and fan engagement strategies.

trailer and reaction videos.opportunity: The popularity of trailers and reaction videos suggests an opportunity to create more engaging content around upcoming releases, including behind-the-scenes looks and fan theory discussions.

cross-promotion.strategy: Leverage the popularity of trending themes by collaborating with creators across different genres to cross-promote content and reach wider audiences.

engagement-enhancing formats.strategy: Utilize formats known to drive engagement, such as live reactions, interactive Q&A sessions, and viewer polls to increase viewer interaction and retention.

metadata optimization.strategy: Improve discoverability by optimizing video metadata with relevant keywords, especially focusing on trending themes and categories, to enhance searchability and audience reach.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
